creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Not a website problem.  Rather a problem of the handbook (the original,
meaning the English version).

Root cause:
Automatic build of floppy images has been disabled starting with 8.0.

See the following thread on the stable mailinglist for more information:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2010-May/056705.html

Best way to proceed for the moment is probably to put a note into the
handbook "that you can still create floppy images under 8.0.  But you
must do it manually".  As the floppy images are still there for 7.X.

- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
